349.issue_title: Template Workspace Initiative: workspace-owned templates, schema packs

cycles.name: C_CONFIG.1

deliverables.description: Update mcp_server/config/schemas/artifact_registry_config.py to parse YAML schema definition
Update tests/mcp_server/config/test_component_registry.py to cover the new schema parsing

cycles.exit_criteria: ArtifactRegistryConfig parses schema definition correctly. tests/mcp_server/config/test_component_registry.py passes.

cycles.name: C_ENGINE.2

deliverables.description: Refactor mcp_server/managers/artifact_manager.py to dynamically build models

cycles.exit_criteria: get_schema() outputs valid JSON Schema. scaffold_artifact properly fails fast on invalid input using the dynamic model. All typing obligations respected.

cycles.name: C_CLEANUP.3
cycles.exit_criteria: No Python module lookups remain in ArtifactManager. Test helpers are DRY and resolve paths centrally (SSOT). Legacy DTOContext, WorkerContext, etc. are fully deleted.
